---
title: "Stats"
description: |
  Data and graphs
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)  
library(scales)
library(ggtext) 
```


```{r}
processed <-
  readRDS("data/processed_paddles.rds") |>
   dplyr::mutate(start_date = lubridate::ymd(start_date)) 

monthly_totals <- 
  processed |>
  dplyr::mutate(year_month = lubridate::floor_date(start_date, "month")) |>
  dplyr::group_by(year_month) |>
  dplyr::summarise(distance = sum(distance), .groups = "drop") |>
  tidyr::complete(
    year_month = seq(min(year_month), max(year_month), by = "1 month"),
    fill = list(distance = 0)
    )

longest_paddles <- processed |>
  dplyr::slice_max(distance, n = 10) |>
  dplyr::select(name, start_date, distance, filename)
```


## At a glance

```{r}
most_kudos <- processed |> dplyr::slice_max(kudos_count) |> dplyr::select(name, filename, kudos_count)
```

```{r}
longest <- processed |> dplyr::slice_max(distance) |> dplyr::select(name, filename, distance)
```

```{r}
bslib::layout_columns(
  fill = FALSE,
  col_widths = 4,
  bslib::value_box(
    title = "Total Paddles",
    value = nrow(processed),
    showcase = bsicons::bs_icon("water"),
    theme = "primary"
  ),
  bslib::value_box(
    title = "Distance paddled",
    value = glue::glue("{round(sum(processed$distance))} km"),
    showcase = bsicons::bs_icon("pin-map-fill"),
    theme = "primary"
  ),
  bslib::value_box(
    title = "Time on the water",
    value = glue::glue("{round(sum(processed$moving_time_minutes) / 60)} hours"),
    showcase = bsicons::bs_icon("clock-fill"),
    theme = "primary"
  ),
  bslib::value_box(
    title = "Longest Paddle",
    value = paste0(round(longest$distance, 1), "km"),
    htmltools::p(longest$name),
    showcase = bsicons::bs_icon("trophy-fill"),
    theme = "primary"
  ),
  bslib::value_box(
    title = "Most Kudos",
    value = paste0(most_kudos$kudos_count, " kudos"),
    htmltools::p(most_kudos$name),
    showcase = bsicons::bs_icon("hand-thumbs-up-fill"),
    theme = "primary"
  ),
  bslib::value_box(
  title = "Years Paddling",
  value = dplyr::n_distinct(lubridate::year(processed$start_date)),
  htmltools::p(paste(min(lubridate::year(processed$start_date)), "–", max(lubridate::year(processed$start_date)))),
  showcase = bsicons::bs_icon("calendar-range"),
  theme = "primary"
)
)
```


## Year by year

```{r}
year_count <- processed |>
  dplyr::mutate(year = lubridate::year(start_date)) |>
  dplyr::group_by(year) |>
  dplyr::summarise(total_km = sum(distance),
                   count = n()) |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(total_km, count),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  ) |>
  mutate(metric = factor(metric, levels = c("count", "total_km"))) |>
  group_by(metric) |>
  mutate(value_scaled = value / max(value)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  dplyr::mutate(value_label = case_when(metric == "total_km" ~ paste0(round(value), "km"),
                          metric == "count" ~ paste0(round(value), " paddles")
                          ))



col_vec <- c(
  "count" = "#104E8B",
  "total_km" = "#FF7F50"
)
  

ggplot(year_count, aes(y = metric, x = value_scaled, fill = metric)) +
  # Background "empty" grey bar at 100%
  geom_col(aes(x = 1), fill = "grey95") +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = value_label), x = 1.01, hjust = 0, size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = col_vec) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  facet_wrap(~year, ncol = 1, strip.position = "left") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0, "lines"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(1, 4, 1, 1, "lines"),  # large right margin for labels
    plot.subtitle = element_textbox_simple(),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  labs(y = NULL, x = NULL, fill = "Metric",
   title =  "Paddles & distance per year",
       subtitle = glue::glue("Bars show <span style='color:{col_vec[[1]]}'>{names(col_vec)[[1]]}</span> and <span style='color:{col_vec[[2]]}'>{names(col_vec)[[2]]}</span>
"))
```


```{r}
month_count <- processed |>
  dplyr::mutate(month = lubridate::month(start_date, label = TRUE)) |>
  dplyr::count(month) |>
  dplyr::mutate(is_max = (n == max(n)))

  ggplot(month_count, aes(x = month, y = n, fill = is_max)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = "#1D3557",  # dark blue (max)
               "FALSE" = "#A8DADC") # light blue (others)
  ) +
  labs(title =  "Paddling by month",
       subtitle = "Total sessions across all years") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "none",
             axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(), 
    axis.title = element_blank())
```

```{r}
processed |>
  ggplot(aes(x = start_date, y = distance, size = kudos_count)) +
  geom_point(colour = "skyblue", alpha = 0.3) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) + 
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, " km")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank()
  ) + 
  labs(title = "All paddles over time")
```

## Top ten longest paddles

```{r}
library(reactable)
library(htmltools)

# Add a rank column to the data
longest_paddles_ranked <- longest_paddles |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    rank = dplyr::row_number(),
    .before = name
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(filename = stringr::str_replace(filename, "\\.md", "\\.html")) # TODO replace

reactable(
  longest_paddles_ranked,
  highlight = TRUE,
  bordered = TRUE,
  striped = TRUE,
  compact = TRUE,
  onClick = JS("function(rowInfo, column) {
    window.open(rowInfo.values['filename'], '_blank')
  }"),
  rowStyle = list(cursor = "pointer"),
  columns = list(
    rank = colDef(
      name = "#",
      width = 45,
      align = "center",
      cell = JS("function(cellInfo) {
        const medals = { 1: '🥇', 2: '🥈', 3: '🥉' }
        return medals[cellInfo.value] || cellInfo.value
      }")
    ),
    name = colDef(name = "Paddle"),
    start_date = colDef(name = "Date", width = 100),
    distance = colDef(
      name = "Distance",
      align = "left",
      html = TRUE,
      cell = JS("function(cellInfo) {
        const value = cellInfo.value.toFixed(1)
        const maxVal = 32.3
        const pct = (cellInfo.value / maxVal * 100) + '%'
        return `
          <div style='display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;'>
            <span style='min-width:38px;'>
              ${value}<span style='font-size:0.8em; color:#999; margin-left:2px;'>km</span>
            </span>
            <div style='flex-grow:1; background:#e1e1e1; border-radius:3px; height:0.75rem;'>
              <div style='width:${pct}; background:#00bfc4; height:100%; border-radius:3px;'></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        `
      }")
    ),
    filename = colDef(show = FALSE)
  )
)
```

```{r}
#| eval: false
ggplot(monthly_totals, aes(x = year_month, y = distance)) +
  geom_area(fill = "#7FCDBB", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_line(color = "#2C7FB8", linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "3 months", date_labels = "%b %Y") +
  labs(
    title = "Paddling Through the Year",
    subtitle = "Distance per month",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Distance (km)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1)
  )
```

```{r}
#| eval: false
monthly_totals |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    year = lubridate::year(year_month),
    month = lubridate::month(year_month, label = TRUE)
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = factor(year), fill = distance)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#EDF8FB", high = "#08589E") +
  labs(
    title = "Did I paddle this month?",
    subtitle = "Darker = more distance",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    fill = "km"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```
